snippet.title: L’armée fantôme de Poutine : enquête sur les mercenaires russes Wagner
snippet.description:
Ils s’entraînent, combattent et meurent dans un épais secret. Depuis 2012, de l’Ukraine à la Centrafrique, via la Syrie, la Libye ou Madagascar, des mercenaires russes du groupe Wagner portent les armes dans des zones où la Russie n’a officiellement envoyé se battre aucun soldat. Découvrez notre nouvelle enquête vidéo.

Collectées puis analysées par Le Monde et des enquêteurs internationaux, des documents partagés en ligne permettent de suivre l’activité de certains membres du groupe Wagner : combats dans le Donbass auprès des prorusses, en Syrie auprès de Bachar Al-Assad, en soutien aux forces du maréchal Haftar en Libye, missions de protection du président centrafricain…

Cette enquête vidéo du Monde met également en lumière certains personnages clés dans l’organisation et le financement des mercenaires Wagner : du parrain du groupe, l’oligarque Evgueni Prigojine, proche de Vladimir Poutine, à Dimitri Sytyi, jeune polyglotte passé par une école de commerce française, parachuté dirigeant d’une entreprise d’extraction minière en République centrafricaine.

#EnquêteVidéo

Vous souhaitez nous contacter ? Nous envoyer des infos ou des documents confidentiels ?
Voici notre adresse : investigation@lemonde.fr 

----------

Retrouvez toutes nos enquêtes vidéo https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLFuK0VAIne9LVg-1mTFeGvisVBWdGLelc

Abonnez-vous à la chaîne YouTube du Monde (et activez la cloche pour les notifications !) 👉 http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=LeMonde

en.title: Putin's 'ghost army': investigating Wagner Russian mercenaries
en.description:
They train, fight and die in deep secrecy. Since 2012, from Ukraine to the Central African Republic, via Syria, Libya or Madagascar, Russian mercenaries from the Wagner group have been carrying arms in areas where Russia has officially sent no soldiers to fight. Here is our new video investigation.

Collected and analyzed by Le Monde and international investigators, documents shared online make it possible to follow the activity of some members of the Wagner group: fighting in Ukraine with the pro-Russian, in Syria with Bashar Al-Assad, in support of the forces of the Marshal Haftar in Libya, or protecting the President of the Central African Republic ...

This video investigationalso sheds light on some key figures in the organization and financing of Wagner mercenaries: from the group's godfather, the oligarch Yevgeny Prigojine, close to Vladimir Poutine, to Dimitri Sytyi, a young polyglot, parachuted manager of a mining company in the Central African Republic.

If you want to contact us or send us confidential tips, here is our mail: investigation@lemonde.fr

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! Two New Brawlers, TONS of Skins, and a New Game mode!?
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! ►► https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ►► https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don’t let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team’s safe and try to crack open your opponents’. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you’re the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support — or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Baylor wins the 2021 NCAA basketball championship | extended highlights
snippet.description:
Baylor dominated from wire to wire to defeat Gonzaga and win the 2021 National Championship! The Bears won their first title in program history behind 22 points from Jared Butler and 19 from MaCio Teague. Watch the extended highlights here.

Watch highlights, game recaps, and much more from the 2021 NCAA Division I Men’s Basketball Tournament on the official NCAA March Madness YouTube channel. Subscribe now to be updated on the latest videos: http://www.youtube.com/marchmadness?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with March Madness:
Follow March Madness on Twitter: https://twitter.com/marchmadness
Like March Madness on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NCAAMarchMadness
Follow March Madness on Instagram: https://instagram.com/marchmadness

snippet.title: JE SUIS TRANSGENRE - TARTINE DE VIE
snippet.description:
J'ai vu et entendu beaucoup de prises de parole autour des transidentités dans les médias mais finalement assez peu d'écoute des personnes concernées.

Alors voici un moment de douceur avec 3 personnes transgenres qui viennent nous partager de leur expérience :
Louis, que vous avez déjà vu sur Entre Mecs
Lexie, qui tient le compte Insta "Agressively_trans"
Morgan, psychothérapeute et formateur sur la diversité des genres

Merci pour la confiance et ces témoignages précieux. ❤️
Continuons, chacun et chacune d'entre nous de prendre le temps de s'écouter. 

-----

Si tu as kiffé cet épisode, laisse un commentaire de soutien, pour que cette vidéo soit vue MASSIVEMENT tu koné. Même si c’est un simple « ❤️ » ou un « Merci, merci, merci, merci, merci, merci, merci. » (Merci x7 fonctionne aussi.)

Abonne-toi à la chaine pour ne pas manquer les prochaines vidéos (dimanche prochain, oui.)
Bisous ❤️
